name: Western Union
description_short: Raleigh, NC Western Union at 3415 Avent Ferry Rd offers check cashing and money transfers, open 6AM-midnight daily.
description_long:
This Western Union location sits at 3415 Avent Ferry Rd in Raleigh, NC, operating as a standalone check-cashing store. Open from 6AM to midnight every day of the week, it's accessible whether you need quick service in the morning or late-night transactions on Sunday evenings. The location is easy to access from surrounding Raleigh neighborhoods and commercial areas.

At this Raleigh location, you can cash checks, wire money domestically and internationally, pay bills, and handle other money transfer needs. Call 919-858-9772 to confirm current services or get details about fees and processing times specific to your transaction.

For Raleigh residents needing check cashing or money transfers without a bank account, this 24-hour-daily Western Union offers convenient access. Bring a valid government-issued ID and arrive during your preferred time—early morning, afternoon, or late night all work here since the location never closes its doors.
pros: Extensive agent network with 150+ searchable locations across the US at major retailers (Walmart, City Market, Safeway, Kroger, Circle K)
24/7 online money transfer initiation through WU.com, with in-store payment options during agent location hours
Multiple service options including money transfers, cash pickup, bill payment, mobile top-ups, money orders, and prepaid card delivery
Multilingual platform support in 6 languages (English, Spanish, Haitian Creole, Chinese, French, Vietnamese)
Rewards program and referral incentives for frequent users
Money tracking capabilities to monitor transfer status in real-time
Integrated inmate payment services and specific business payment solutions
cons: Transfer fees apply and vary by method and destination, making costs less transparent without specific quotes
Service availability limited to agent store hours rather than true 24/7 access at physical locations
Website shows technical issues including temporarily unavailable payment methods (Orange wallet) and 404 page errors
No credit products, lending, or savings account options—functions only as a payment facilitator
Dependent on retail partner hours and policies, which may vary by location and restrict customer access
best_for: Immigrants and international customers sending money to family abroad through an established, trusted network
Consumers without traditional bank accounts seeking non-bank payment and money transfer services
Retail shoppers who want to handle money transfers conveniently during existing shopping trips at major retailers
Customers preferring in-person transactions and human assistance for bill payment and money services
diagnosis: Western Union is best for consumers without traditional bank accounts or those frequently sending international money transfers who value an established, multilingual service with extensive retail agent locations. The main caveat is that Western Union is a payment service, not a bank or lender—it does not offer credit products, deposits, or savings vehicles, and all services depend on agent location hours despite online initiation being available 24/7.
services: Online money transfer (24/7 initiation through WU.com)
In-store money transfer and cash pickup at agent locations
Money tracking and transfer status monitoring
meta_description: Western Union at 3415 Avent Ferry Rd, Raleigh, NC. Check cashing and money transfers, open 6AM-12AM.
